sections.sectionTitle: A Sanggamte tungah Josef Kilaak Tawm

verses.text: Tua ciangin ama kianga dingte khempeuh' mai-ah Josef ki-ipzo nawnlo a, “Ka kiang panin mi khempeuh paikhia un,” ci-in a kiko hi. Tua ahih manin Josef a sanggamte tungah amah a kipulak ciangin kuamah dang omlo hi
Amah a gingin kapkhia ahih manin Egypt mite in za a, Faro' innkuante in zong za uh hi
Josef in a sanggamte kiangah, “Kei, Josef ka hi hi. I pa a nungta lai hiam?” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a sanggamte maizum uh ahih manin amah dawng theilo uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Josef in a sanggamte kiangah, “Ka nai-ah hong pai un, hong thum ing,” a ci hi. Amaute a nai-ah hong pai uh hi. Amah in, “Kei pen Egypt-ah nong zuak uh na sanggampa uh Josef ka hi hi
Hih lai-ah kei nong zuak manun tu-in lungkham kei un. Nomau tungah kiheh tawm kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh nuntakna a hu dingin note' mai-ah Pasian in kei hong sawl hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh gam sungah kum nih sung kialpi tungzo hi. Lo khawhloh, an lakloh ding kum nga omlai hi
Note-a' dingin leitungah a omlai mi a hingsak ding leh note-a' dingin a suakta mi tampi a kem dingin note' mai-ah Pasian in kei hong sawl hi

Tua ahih ciangin hih lai-ah a hong sawl mi pen note na hi kei uh a, Pasian ahi hi. Amah in Faro' khutnuai-ah a ulian penin kei hong bawlin, ama innsung khempeuh' topa leh Egypt gam khempeuh a ukpa-in kei hong bawlkhin hi
“Manlangin i pa kiangah va ciahto un la ama kiangah, ‘Na tapa Josef in hih bangin ci hi: Pasian in Egypt gam khempeuh' topa-in kei hong bawl khin hi. Ka kiangah hong paisuk hen, zekai kei hen
Goshen leitangah na teng ding a, nang leh na tate' tate leh na tuuhonte leh na bawnghonte leh na neih khempeuh tawh, nang pen kei tawh a kinai-in na om ding hi
Hong tung ding kialpi kum nga omlai ahih manin tua lai-ah nang kong vak ding hi. Tua hi kei leh nang leh na innkuanpihte leh na neih khempeuh in zawn'na na ngah ding uh hi, ci hi,’ va ci un
“Note' kianga thu hong gen pen keima kam ahihna tu-in note' mitin nong mu uh a, ka sanggampa Benjamin' mit in zong hong mu hi
Egypt-ah keima liatna khempeuh leh note' muhsa khempeuh, i pa' kiangah na gen ding uh hi. Manlang un la, hih lai-ah i pa hong paipih suk un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin a sanggampa Benjamin ngawng kawi-in a kap hi. Benjamin in zong amah ngawng kawi-in a kap hi
Tua ciangin a kah kawmin a sanggamte khempeuh ngawng kawi-in a nam hi. Tua khit ciangin a sanggamte in amah hopih uh hi
“Josef' sanggamte hong pai,” cihna thu Faro' inn sungah a kizak ciangin, tua thu in Faro leh a nasemte lungdamsak mahmah hi
Faro in Josef kiangah, “Na sanggamte kiangah, ‘Hih bangin gamta un: Na ganhingte uh van suan un la, Kanaan gamah ciahkik un
I pa leh na innkuanpihte uh va la un la, kei kiangah hong pai un. Egypt gam a hoihpen mun note kong pia ding a, note in gam hoih sunga piangte na ne ding uh hi,’ ci in
Amaute zong thu pia in la, ‘Hih bangin gamta un: Na tate leh na zite uh-a' dingin Egypt panin leeng la un la, i pa hong paipih un
Egypt gam khempeuh a hoih penna nomau-a' ahih ciangin na vante uh ngaihsutin nei kei un,’ ci in,” a ci hi
Israel' tapate tua bangmahin gamta uh hi. Josef in Faro' thupiak mah bangin amaute leeng pia a, lampi-a a nek ding uh an zong a pia hi
Amah in amaute khempeuh tungah puan hoih silh khat ciat a pia hi. Ahih hangin Benjamin' tungah ngun shekel za thum leh puan hoih silh nga a pia hi
Amah in a pa kiangah a nuai-ate a khak hi: Egypt na hoihte a pua la sawm; antang, anlum, leh lampi-a a pa' nek ding an a pua lapi sawm a puak hi
Tua ciangin amah in a sanggamte sawlkhia a, amaute a paikhiat ciangin amah in amaute kiangah, “Lampi-ah kitawng kei un,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute Egypt panin paito uh a, a pa uh Jakob kiang Kanaan gamah ciah uh hi
Amaute in ama kiangah, “Josef nungta lai a, amah pen Egypt gam khempeuh a ukpa na hi hi,” hong ci uh hi. Amah in amaute' thugen umlo ahih ciangin a lung si hi
Ahih hangin amaute' tunga Josef' gen kammalte ama kiangah a gen ciang leh Josef in amah puakna dinga a khak leengte a muh ciangin, a pa uh Jakob' lungsim hingkik hi
Israel in, “Phazo hi. Ka tapa Josef nungta lai hi. Ka sih ma-in pai-in amah ka mu ding hi,” a ci hi.
